description: DQ-Mastery-Summary.md was written to the IES root directory instead of an appropriate subfolder. Jarvis used the Write tool directly without delegating to the correct agent for file placement decisions.
correction: Research output documents should not land in the IES root. The correct location depends on content type (meetings/, docs/, accounts/, etc.). When creating non-system files, use the appropriate subdirectory or delegate to the agent responsible for that domain.
systemic_fix: Before writing any new file with the Write tool, confirm the target path is not the IES root. If unsure of correct location, ask David before writing.
